title: Nami Fights to Keep the Treasure
description: On pages 1–4, Nami’s obsession with treasure collides with Luffy’s blunt honesty and Buggy’s chaos.
scene: Nami tries to protect what she has stolen or earned, while the surrounding fight keeps pulling her deeper into the Straw Hats’ orbit.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHO ARE YOU... AND WHAT'S YOUR DEATH WISH?

dialogue.speaker: Mayor Boodle
dialogue.text: I'm boodle, and I've been mayor of this town since you were pillaging nurseries!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Does he really think he can beat the captain!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: WHY, KEELHALL ME! IT'S CABAJI THE ACROBAT!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I DON'T WANT TO GET BUSITY...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Buggy's second mate CABAJ! The acrobat

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ARG! WE WON'T BE SEEING CABAJI'S ACROBATIC SHOW!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A LITTLE OLD TO BE MAKING A NAME FOR YOURSELF, AREN'T YOU?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This town is my treasure, and I'm going to protect it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You SENILE OLD FOOL! THE ONLY TREASURE HERE IS FOR TERMITES! GOOD AND JEWELS ARE TREASURE!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: TREASURE SPARKLES AND MAKES ITS POSSESSOR A KING!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This dump of yours doesn't sparkle, it rots!

summary: The part keeps Nami morally complicated: she is selfish, clever, and frightened, but also increasingly tied to Luffy and Zoro.
